name: Story Studio
description: We turn your memories into timeless visuals — from weddings to brands, every story deserves to be beautifully told.

hero.heading: Capture Moments That Last Forever
hero.subheading: We turn your memories into timeless visuals — from weddings to brands, every story deserves to be beautifully told.

about.heading: Behind the Lens
about.body:
Hi, I'm Drashti, a passionate photographer who believes every moment has a story worth capturing. With a keen eye for detail and a love for natural aesthetics, I specialize in creating images that feel real, emotional, and timeless.

With a deep appreciation for natural light, subtle details, and genuine emotions, we approach every shoot with intention and artistry.

services.name: Wedding Photography
services.desc: Timeless, candid coverage of your entire celebration.

services.name: Portrait Sessions
services.desc: Authentic portraits that capture your personality.

services.name: Brand Photography
services.desc: Visual storytelling that elevates your brand.

services.name: Event Coverage
services.desc: Every moment, every detail, beautifully documented.

testimonials.quote: The photos captured our wedding day perfectly. Every emotion, every detail — it was like reliving the day all over again.
testimonials.name: Mia & Jackson

testimonials.quote: Story Studio has an incredible talent for making you feel comfortable and bringing out natural expressions. The results speak for themselves.
testimonials.name: Arjun Patel
